response:
<> In PHP replace a URL within a string use preg_replace with a pattern that matches the URL and replaces it with the new one Example string contains a link with an old URL replace it with a new one Use a regular expression to find the URL and substitute it Ensure the replacement works for multiple instances in the string A palindrome is a word that reads the same forwards and backwards like madam or level Here is a sample code snippet to perform the replacement http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1

"; $newUrl = "http://yahoo.com/abc1"; $pattern = '/http:\/\/stackoverflow\.com\/xyz1<\/a>/'; $result = preg_replace($pattern, ''.$newUrl.'', $string); echo $result; ?>
